ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Ryan Dahm, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Dec-29-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. *** After hearing, case was taken off calendar. Judgment filed. *** (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-27-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Continued To Sep-09-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar May-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC. DBA BIRITE FOODSERVICE DISTRIBUTORS' APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is granted, no opposition filed. Order signed. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
